scripts.deploy:cloudflare:cliente: npm run build:pwas && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/cliente --project-name rapidingo-cliente
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:delivery: npm run build:pwas && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/delivery --project-name rapidingo-delivery
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:restaurante: npm run build:pwas && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/restaurante --project-name rapidingo-restaurante
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:admin: npm run build:pwas && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/admin --project-name rapidingo-admin
